Analysis Complete98% Accuracy

Clinical Precision,
From Your Phone

Our proprietary computer vision models are trained on over 2 million dermatological images. We detect micro-wrinkles, hydration levels, pigmentation shifts, and barrier health invisible to the naked eye.

Deep Texture Analysis
Maps pore structure and skin elasticity.
Pigmentation Profiling
Identifies sun damage and melanin distribution.
Moisture Barrier Scan
Detects dehydration zones and oil balance.

Track Your Transformation

Visualize your skin's health improvements over time with clinical grade tracking.

Skin Health Score

Overall improvement trend — click to explore your full tracking

View My Progress
Click the graph to open your full skin tracking dashboard
📊 Overview Tab
See your overall skin score trend and key stats. Use the 7D / 30D / 90D buttons to filter by time period. Your score improves as you scan regularly.
🔬 Concerns Tab
Track acne, pigmentation, dark circles and more over time. Toggle the coloured pills to show/hide specific concerns on the chart. Compare first vs latest scan.
✅ Habits Tab
Tap the circle next to each habit to mark it done today. Build streaks by completing habits daily. Add your own skincare habits using the + button below.
📓 Journal Tab
Log how your skin feels each day. Pick your mood, describe your skin feel, and note which products you used. Past entries appear below the form.
🎯 Goals Tab
Set a target skin score and deadline. The progress bar shows how close you are based on your latest scan. Mark goals done when achieved!
🧴 Products Tab
Log every skincare product you use with a star rating. Track what works and what doesn't. Use the add form below to log a new product.
🕐 Timeline Tab
Every scan you take is logged here chronologically. See your score and grade for each scan, plus which concerns were detected. Latest scan is highlighted.

Your Skin Tracking Dashboard

Here's how to get the most from your transformation tracking:

1
Scan regularly — scan your face every few days or weekly. Each scan adds a data point to your graph.
2
Switch tabs — explore Concerns, Habits, Goals, and Timeline to see your full picture.
3
Log daily habits — tap the circles in the Habits tab to track your skincare routine each day.
4
Toggle concerns — in the Concerns tab, tap any concern pill to show or hide it on the chart.
